claims.summary: Components, context, and control need distinct schema ownership so descriptive texture cannot silently become control.
claims.disposition: verify canonical protocol DTOs and bridge-owned evidence types preserve those ownership boundaries

claims.summary: Optional telemetry fields require backward-compatible defaults and exact legacy decoding.
claims.disposition: verify serde defaults, captured legacy fixtures, field-presence metadata, and compatibility projections

claims.summary: String safety labels can drift unless trusted authority is represented by checked transitions.
claims.disposition: verify EvidenceOnly, ApprovalPending, AuthorityGranted, and LiveExecutable typestates while treating legacy strings as projections only

claims.summary: PressureTrend should make source gaps, velocity, density, resonance, viscosity, entropy, fill, and timing explicit.
claims.disposition: verify pressure trend construction, telemetry-gap classification, exact thresholds, and smoothing tests
